name: Daftra Invoice

Subtotal:{{ doc.total or 0 }}
Discount:{{ doc.discount_amount or 0 }}
VAT Amount:{{ doc.tax_amount or 0 }}

Paid:{{ doc.paid_amount }}
Balance Due:{{ doc.balance or doc.total - doc.paid_amount }}

{{ doc.terms or "" }}
